ratings.comment: The class was very straightforward. Most of your grade is the semester-long group project. There were incorrect due dates on the canvas site and it didn't have the best organization overall. There were also a lot of times where Dr. C gave contradicting information regarding project expectations that didn't align with TA's expectations.

The class was decent but had its frustrations. Attendance (15%) was mandatory, but lectures were just reading off slides. Two exams (7.5%) were simple if you understood the content. The group project (45%) and presentation (25%) were fine with a good group. Course page lacked clarity due to outdated info. Overall, good. Could be more organized.
